ddls:
CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "ein" TEXT /* Employer Identification Number (EIN) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the organization */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the organization is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the organization is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the organization */,
  "total_assets" REAL /* Total assets of the organization */,
  "total_income" REAL /* Total income of the organization */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue of the organization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the organization */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the organization */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the organization */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the organization was founded */,
  "tax_status" TEXT /* Current tax status (e.g., 501(c)(3)) */,
  "mission_statement" TEXT /* Mission statement of the organization */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CEO or Executive Director */,
  "board_members" TEXT /* List of board members */,
  "fiscal_year_start" TEXT /* Start date of the fiscal year */,
  "fiscal_year_end" TEXT /* End date of the fiscal year */,
  "legal_status" TEXT /* Legal status of the organization (e.g., incorporated, unincorporated) */,
  "annual_report_url" TEXT /* URL to the latest annual report */,
  "registered_office" TEXT /* Registered office address */,
  "number_of_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial transaction */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization the transaction belongs to */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., income, expense, donation) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the transaction (e.g., operational, project-specific) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the transaction (e.g., donor, grant) */,
  "destination" TEXT /* Destination of the transaction (e.g., project, operational expenses) */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed, cancelled) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the transaction (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number for the transaction */,
  "payment_reference" TEXT /* Payment reference or transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who created the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_transactions_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization managing the project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed, planned) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "project_leader" TEXT /* Name of the project leader */,
  "team_members" TEXT /* List of team members working on the project */,
  "goals" TEXT /* Specific goals of the project */,
  "outcomes" TEXT /* Expected outcomes of the project */,
  "impact_area" TEXT /* Area of impact (e.g., education, health, environment) */,
  "funding_required" REAL /* Total funding required for the project */,
  "funding_received" REAL /* Total funding received for the project */,
  "percentage_completion" REAL /* Percentage of project completion */,
  "next_milestone" TEXT /* Next significant milestone in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "donors" (
  "donor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each donor */,
  "donor_name" TEXT /* Name of the donor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the donor */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the donor is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the donor is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the donor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the donor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the donor */,
  "donor_type" TEXT /* Type of donor (e.g., individual, corporation, foundation) */,
  "donation_history" TEXT /* Donation history of the donor */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the donor */,
  "donor_status" TEXT /* Status of the donor (e.g., active, inactive, prospect) */,
  "donor_segment" TEXT /* Segment of the donor (e.g., major donors, recurring donors, one-time donors) */,
  "last_donation_date" TEXT /* Date of the last donation */,
  "total_donation_amount" REAL /* Total amount donated by the donor */,
  "donor_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the donor based on total donations */,
  "preferred_communication" TEXT /* Preferred method of communication (e.g., email, phone, mail) */,
  "donor_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the donor's preferences and interactions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("donor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "donations" (
  "donation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each donation */,
  "donor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the donor making the donation */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project receiving the donation */,
  "donation_date" TEXT /* Date of the donation */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the donation */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the donation (e.g., check, credit card, wire transfer) */,
  "donation_type" TEXT /* Type of donation (e.g., one-time, recurring) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the donation */,
  "donation_status" TEXT /* Status of the donation (e.g., pending, completed, cancelled) */,
  "donation_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the donation (e.g., monthly, annually) */,
  "donation_purpose" TEXT /* Specific purpose of the donation */,
  "donation_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the donation on the project or organization */,
  "donation_certificate_issued" TEXT /* Indicates if a donation certificate has been issued (e.g., yes, no) */,
  "donation_certificate_url" TEXT /* URL to the donation certificate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("donation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_funding" (
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding record */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project receiving the funding */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the funding source (e.g., grant, donation) */,
  "funding_amount" REAL /* Amount of funding received */,
  "funding_date" TEXT /* Date of the funding */,
  "funding_type" TEXT /* Type of funding (e.g., grant, donation) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the funding */,
  "funding_status" TEXT /* Status of the funding (e.g., pending, received, pending approval) */,
  "funding_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions attached to the funding */,
  "funding_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the funding on the project */,
  "funding_certificate_issued" TEXT /* Indicates if a funding certificate has been issued (e.g., yes, no) */,
  "funding_certificate_url" TEXT /* URL to the funding certificate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_funding_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES funding_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_funding_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the funding source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of funding source (e.g., grant, donation) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the funding source */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the funding source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the funding source */,
  "source_status" TEXT /* Status of the funding source (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "source_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the funding source based on total contributions */,
  "last_funding_date" TEXT /* Date of the last funding */,
  "total_funding_amount" REAL /* Total amount funded by the source */,
  "funding_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of funding (e.g., monthly, annually) */,
  "funding_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions attached to the funding */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the funding source */,
  "source_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the funding source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, staff, volunteer) */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., full, limited) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the user is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the user is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the user */,
  "user_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view, edit) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., project, donation, report) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "access_status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "access_duration" REAL /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization the report belongs to */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., financial, project progress, donor activity) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report file in MB */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who created the report */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final, archived) */,
  "report_version" TEXT /* Version of the report */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "report_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the report */,
  "report_audience" TEXT /* Intended audience for the report (e.g., board members, donors, public) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where the change occurred */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record that was changed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date of the action */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the change */,
  "action_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "action_user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_status" TEXT /* Status of the action (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "action_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance check */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date of the compliance check */,
  "check_type" TEXT /* Type of compliance check (e.g., financial, operational, legal) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the compliance check (e.g., passed, failed, pending) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the compliance check */,
  "conducted_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who conducted the check */,
  "check_status" TEXT /* Status of the compliance check (e.g., passed, failed, pending, rejected) */,
  "check_details" TEXT /* Detailed findings of the compliance check */,
  "check_audience" TEXT /* Intended audience for the compliance check (e.g., board members, regulatory bodies) */,
  "check_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the compliance check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_checks_conducted_by FOREIGN KEY ("conducted_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_checks_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id")
)
